ground_truth.title: Hotel and Gaming Trades Council (EN)
ground_truth.main_content: Hotel and Gaming Trades Council, AFL-CIO is the union of hotel workers in the New York City metropolitan area, the Capital Region of New York State, and New Jersey, representing nearly 40,000 non-managerial employees. The website provides access to member services including login, account creation, password reset, and verification features. Members can access union benefits, representation, training programs, and news. The site also includes a tool to find union hotels and an interactive union comparison survey for non-union workers to compare union vs non-union employment terms.
